DEMURRER TO 4TH AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-08-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Judge: Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Reporter: not reported. (D501)

No appearances.

The Court Adopts the Tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK's DEMURRER TO 4TH AMENDED COMPLAINT is Sustained with final leave to amend for Plaintiff to allege: (1) tender under the second lien; (2) fraud with specificity as to each actionable misrepresentation "how, when, who, in what manner and to whom."; (3) reasonable reliance on February 25, 2013 misrepresentation in light of opposition to TRO request on February 22, 2013; (4) damages not caused by Plaintiff's default; and (5) facts giving rise to duty and breach of duty. Request for Judicial Notice is granted. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312.
